headline: Wynn Resorts Announces Second Quarter Earnings Release Date
summary: Wynn Resorts, Limited (NASDAQ: WYNN) announced today that it will release the Company's financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2026 after the market close on Tuesday, August 4, 2026, followed by a conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT (4:30 p.m. ET).

raw.headline: Wynn Resorts Announces Second Quarter Earnings Release Date
raw.summary: Wynn Resorts, Limited (NASDAQ: WYNN) announced today that it will release the Company's financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2026 after the market close on Tuesday, August 4, 2026, followed by a conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT (4:30 p.m. ET).

headline: Macquarie Maintains Outperform on Wynn Resorts, Lowers Price Target to $143
summary: Macquarie  analyst Chad Beynon   maintains Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ:WYNN) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $145 to $143.
